name: clawdmeter-opencode-fff
description: Committed lockfile source for the bundled opencode-fff-search plugin. tools/stage-opencode-fff-plugin.sh copies these two files into the gitignored staging dir and runs `npm ci` against this exact, integrity-locked dependency set. Bump the version here AND regenerate package-lock.json (npm install --package-lock-only) when changing opencode-fff-search.
